prompt: Edit image 1 by integrating the eye icon from image 2 into the curve of the swoosh. Render this combination with a subtle isometric 3D perspective, similar to image 3. Finally, place the text from image 4 beneath the combined icon.
prompt_refined: Perform an in-place edit on image 1 (the black Nike swoosh logo). Integrate the black eye icon from image 2 by embedding it seamlessly along the main curve of the swoosh. Render this newly formed combined graphic with a subtle isometric 3D perspective, deriving its style and dimensionality from image 3. Finally, place the stylized 'monsters' text from image 4 centrally beneath the 3D combined graphic.
objects: Combined black Nike swoosh and eye graphic
'monsters' text centrally beneath the 3D combined graphic
